name: Strixhaven: School of Mages

draft.notes: 9 commons, a common-or-rare lesson, 3 uncommons, a rare, a Mystical Archive card, and an ad-or-placeholder card. No basic land slot. Uncommon lessons count among the three uncommons when they appear. If a foil appears it displaces a non-lesson common and appears after the Mystical Archive card. Set has 63 additional Mystical Archive cards beyond the listed composition. [Refined: added Lesson slot + Mystical Archive slot (set STA); pack totals 15.]

statedRates: Foils in ~33% of boosters. Placeholder cards ~15% of the time.
sourceNotes: Unusual set size due to lesson cards. Mystical Archive slot is in every pack (18 uncommon-archive run, plus rare/mythic archives). Printed US, Belgium, Japan. 36 packs per box. Composition does NOT include the 63 Mystical Archive cards.
